authority_effect: After preview geometry is read, the operator is no longer label-blind for V4-H; previously frozen terminal evaluator code remains immutable but terminal results are research confirmation, not untouched prospective evidence.
candidate_target_rule: PARTIAL_ANALYZABLE only if at least one successful job exists for both 8X6B and 9E6Y; R_dual_min=min(current per-receptor successful-seed medians); no imputation.
claim_boundary: Partial active-campaign development preview only; not terminal teacher, Docking Gold, binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, formal validation, or final submission authority.
snapshot_rule: Capture job IDs whose status is SUCCESS at snapshot start; bind status and job_result SHA256; ignore later completions.
user_authorization: User explicitly requested pulling already successful jobs and testing the full pipeline.
